statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // empty'); all_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // 0) + (.context_window.current_usage.output_tokens // 0) + (.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0) + (.context_window.current_usage.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0)'); if [ -n "$used" ] && [ -n "$total_tok" ] && [ "$all_tok" != "0" ]; then pct=$(printf '%.0f' "$used"); used_k=$(printf '%.0f' $(echo "$all_tok" | awk '{printf "%f", $1/1000}')); total_k=$(printf '%.0f' $(echo "$total_tok" | awk '{printf "%f", $1/1000}')); ctx=$(printf '%s%% (%sk/%sk)' "$pct" "$used_k" "$total_k"); else ctx="n/a"; fi; printf '%s | %s | ctx: %s' "$cwd" "$model" "$ctx"
